modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to manage website notification permissions on my computer

full_description_text:
- I am receiving notifications from various web pages.  
- I want to enable or disable these notifications but don't know how.  
- This issue is happening on both my Windows and MacOS devices.
short_description: Unable to manage website notification permissions on my computer
description:

- This issue is happening on both my Windows and MacOS devices.
